problem_id: AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis for Government Procurement
team_name: ProcureSense: Explainable AI for Auditable Tender Evaluation
summary: Design a technical platform that can understand tenders, evaluate eligibility of bidders, and produce explainable evaluation reports in a government procurement context.
optimization_claims: Strict thresholding on OCR confidence for mitigating poor quality scans
Utilizing semantic embeddings to map synonymous terms before applying deterministic value checks
constraints_addressed: Standardization of extracted text into standard Key-Value pairs
